concerns.text: FR-005 states: "perform linear regression of S(l) versus log l (or versus l^α for area‑law testing) and output the fitted exponent α". Using l^α as a predictor requires knowing α beforehand, so the regression both assumes and determines α, creating a circular definition of the metric. This makes the validation of the exponent tautological and undermines the scientific claim that the exponent measures scaling behavior.
